text: Well in that case I I would like to know the motivation for this use of Abraham Lincoln's body at that time. I am Ra. This shall be the last full query of this session as we find the instrument quite low in vital energies. The one known as Abraham had an extreme difficulty in many ways, and due to a physical, mental and spiritual pain was weary of life, but without the orientation to self destruction in your a time eighteen, a fifty, a three. This entity was contacted in asleep by a fourth density being. This being was concerned with the battle between the forces of light and the forces of darkness which have a being waged in a fourth density for many of your years. This entity accepted the honor duty of completing the one known as Abraham's Akarmic Patterns, and the one known as Abraham discovered that this entity would attempt those things which the one known as Abraham desired to do, but felt it could not. Thus the exchange was made. The entity Abraham was taken to a plane of suspension until the cessation of its physical vehicle, much as though we of Ra would arrange with this instrument to remain in the vehicle, a come out of the trance state and a function as this instrument, a leaving of this instruments, a mind and a spirit complex in its suspended state. The planetary energies at this time were at what seemed to this entity to be at a critical point for that which you know as freedom had gained in acceptance as a possibility among many peoples. This entity saw the work done by those beginning of the democratic concept of freedom, as you call it, in a danger of being abridged or abrogated by the arising belief and use of the principle of the enslavement of entities. This is a negative concept of a fairly serious nature in your density. This entity, therefore, went forward into what it saw as the battle for the light, for healing of a rupture in the concept of freedom. This entity did not gain or lose karma by these activities due to its detachment from any outcome. Its attitude throughout was one of service to others, a more especially to the downtrodden or enslaved. The polarity of the individual was somewhat, but not severely lessened by the accumulative of feelings and thought forms which were created due to large numbers of entities leaving the physical plane due to a trauma of battle.

segment.segment: Well in that case I I would like to know the motivation for this use of Abraham Lincoln's body at that time.
This shall be the last full query of this session as we find the instrument quite low in vital energies.

The one known as Abraham had an extreme difficulty in many ways, and due to a physical, mental and spiritual pain was weary of life, but without the orientation to self destruction in your a time eighteen, a fifty, a three.
This entity was contacted in asleep by a fourth density being.
This being was concerned with the battle between the forces of light and the forces of darkness which have a being waged in a fourth density for many of your years.

This entity accepted the honor duty of completing the one known as Abraham's Akarmic Patterns, and the one known as Abraham discovered that this entity would attempt those things which the one known as Abraham desired to do, but felt it could not.

The entity Abraham was taken to a plane of suspension until the cessation of its physical vehicle, much as though we of Ra would arrange with this instrument to remain in the vehicle, a come out of the trance state and a function as this instrument, a leaving of this instruments, a mind and a spirit complex in its suspended state.
The planetary energies at this time were at what seemed to this entity to be at a critical point for that which you know as freedom had gained in acceptance as a possibility among many peoples.

This entity saw the work done by those beginning of the democratic concept of freedom, as you call it, in a danger of being abridged or abrogated by the arising belief and use of the principle of the enslavement of entities.
This is a negative concept of a fairly serious nature in your density.
This entity, therefore, went forward into what it saw as the battle for the light, for healing of a rupture in the concept of freedom.
This entity did not gain or lose karma by these activities due to its detachment from any outcome.
Its attitude throughout was one of service to others, a more especially to the downtrodden or enslaved.

The polarity of the individual was somewhat, but not severely lessened by the accumulative of feelings and thought forms which were created due to large numbers of entities leaving the physical plane due to a trauma of battle.
